Class VendingMachine

java.lang.Object
VM.VendingMachine
public class VendingMachine extends Object
Represents a vending machine that manages item slots, cash reserves, and vending operations. The machine allows users to select items, accept payments, calculate and dispense change, and dispense purchased items.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VendingMachine()
    Constructs a vending machine by prompting the user to select a machine type and initialize its cash reserves.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    acceptPayment()
    Accepts payment from the user until the selected item's price has been met or the transaction is cancelled.
    void
    collectMoney()
    Displays the total value of the bills and coins received since the last collection and clears the machine's recorded payment history.
    void
    dispenseItem()
    Dispenses the selected item if it is available and the payment is valid.
    ArrayList<Integer>
    getInsertedBills()
    Returns the bills and coins inserted during the current transaction.
    String
    getType()
    Returns the name of the vending machine's selected type.
    void
    replenishCashReserves()
    Replenishes the machine's cash reserves by allowing the user to specify the quantity of each supported bill and coin denomination.
    void
    restockItems()
    Allows the user to restock selected items by specifying the quantity to add.
    void
    returnChange(ArrayList<Integer> bills)
    Returns the specified bills and coins to the user and displays the total amount returned.
    boolean
    selectItem()
    Prompts the user to select an item from the machine.
    void
    setItemPrices()
    Allows the user to update the price of selected items.
    void
    viewTransactionSummary()
    Displays a summary of item transactions, including each item's starting inventory, quantity sold, remaining stock, and the machine's total sales.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • VendingMachine

      public VendingMachine()
      Constructs a vending machine by prompting the user to select a machine type and initialize its cash reserves. The machine is created with a default item corresponding to the selected type.

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the name of the vending machine's selected type.
      Returns:
      the machine type as a string, or null if no valid type has been assigned

    • getInsertedBills

      public ArrayList<Integer> getInsertedBills()
      Returns the bills and coins inserted during the current transaction.
      Returns:
      the list of inserted payment denominations

    • selectItem

      public boolean selectItem()
      Prompts the user to select an item from the machine. If the selected item is unavailable, the user is repeatedly prompted until a valid item is chosen. Selecting 0 cancels the operation.
      Returns:
      true if an item is successfully selected; false if the operation is cancelled

    • acceptPayment

      public boolean acceptPayment()
      Accepts payment from the user until the selected item's price has been met or the transaction is cancelled. Each inserted bill or coin is recorded.
      Returns:
      true if sufficient payment is received; false if the transaction is cancelled

    • dispenseItem

      public void dispenseItem()
      Dispenses the selected item if it is available and the payment is valid. If the transaction cannot be completed, the inserted payment is returned.

    • returnChange

      public void returnChange(ArrayList<Integer> bills)
      Returns the specified bills and coins to the user and displays the total amount returned. The provided collection is cleared after the change has been returned.
      Parameters:
      bills - the bills and coins to return

    • restockItems

      public void restockItems()
      Allows the user to restock selected items by specifying the quantity to add. The operation may be repeated until it is cancelled.

    • setItemPrices

      public void setItemPrices()
      Allows the user to update the price of selected items. The user may repeatedly select items and assign new non-negative prices until the operation is cancelled.

    • collectMoney

      public void collectMoney()
      Displays the total value of the bills and coins received since the last collection and clears the machine's recorded payment history.

    • replenishCashReserves

      public void replenishCashReserves()
      Replenishes the machine's cash reserves by allowing the user to specify the quantity of each supported bill and coin denomination.

    • viewTransactionSummary

      public void viewTransactionSummary()
      Displays a summary of item transactions, including each item's starting inventory, quantity sold, remaining stock, and the machine's total sales.
